grading_notes: Scope = curated pack 'symes-k__power_marketer' only (origin: symes-k/power_marketer). The count is the total number of packaged message files in that pack = 136 (verified by counting lines with pack=='symes-k__power_marketer' in evidence_medium.jsonl, which equals the file count in mail/medium/symes-k__power_marketer/). All messages are counted once; replies/forwards and near-duplicates are included. Answer must equal the integer 136. Evidence is illustrative: any one boundary/anchor message in the pack is accepted (evidence_mode=any); the two listed ids are the earliest and latest messages in the pack.

Scope = curated pack 'steffes-j__credit_issues' only (origin: steffes-j/credit_issues). Counted rule: packaged emails whose trimmed Subject begins case-insensitively with 're:', 'fw:', or 'fwd:'. Count over the whole pack = 51 (verified against evidence_medium.jsonl; matches the pack's documented reply/forward count). Answer must equal the integer 51. Evidence_mode=any: each listed id is a representative reply/forward message inside the pack; any in-scope reply message id is acceptable as an anchor.

Scope = curated pack 'kean-s__ferc' only (origin: kean-s/ferc). Earliest email by top-level Date header, computed by sorting the ISO 8601 dates of all pack messages ascending. Earliest = 2000-03-15T07:37:00-08:00 (Subject 'Aquila v. Entergy', Message-ID <26816706.1075846346223.JavaMail.evans@thyme>). Date matched per NORMALIZATION.md: canonical is the Pacific-offset ISO 8601 value; equivalent representations of the same instant (e.g. UTC) and the date-only form 2000-03-15 are accepted (see aliases). The single earliest Message-ID is required (evidence_mode=all).

Scope = curated pack 'symes-k__scheduling' only (origin: symes-k/scheduling). Latest email by top-level Date header, computed by sorting the ISO 8601 dates of all pack messages descending. Latest = 2001-05-01T07:45:00-07:00 (Subject 'May purchase from MPC', Message-ID <6822417.1075841878775.JavaMail.evans@thyme>). Date matched per NORMALIZATION.md: canonical is the Pacific-offset ISO 8601 value; equivalent same-instant representations and the date-only form 2001-05-01 are accepted (see aliases). The single latest Message-ID is required (evidence_mode=all).

Scope = curated pack 'williams-w3__rt_strat' only (origin: williams-w3/rt_strat). Participant set = union of all addresses appearing in the top-level From, To, and Cc headers across every packaged email in the pack, lowercased and de-duplicated. Result is the 19-address set in accepted_answer.value. Compared as a SET (order-independent) per NORMALIZATION.md; addresses matched case-insensitively. A submission must contain exactly these 19 addresses (no more, no fewer). Evidence_mode=any: any in-scope pack message id anchors the answer; participants are computed over all 18 messages in the pack.

Scope = curated pack 'symes-k__scheduling' only (origin: symes-k/scheduling). Sender set = distinct top-level From addresses across every packaged email in the pack, lowercased and de-duplicated. Result is the 6-address set in accepted_answer.value. Compared as a SET (order-independent), addresses case-insensitive, per NORMALIZATION.md. A submission must contain exactly these 6 addresses. Evidence_mode=any: the two listed ids are representative messages from the two highest-volume senders (cara.semperger, lester.rawson); any in-scope pack message id is an acceptable anchor.

Scope = curated pack 'symes-k__power_marketer' only (origin: symes-k/power_marketer). The recurring publication is the 'PowerMarketers.com Daily Power Report', whose title heads 99 of the 136 packaged emails (verified by counting Subjects beginning 'PowerMarketers.com Daily Power Report' in evidence_medium.jsonl) — by far the most common recurring item. Grade correct if the answer names the PowerMarketers.com Daily Power Report (canonical value or a listed alias; case-insensitive, punctuation-insensitive). This is a summary/naming answer, so equivalence is judged on naming that report specifically. Evidence_mode=any: the listed id is a representative Daily Power Report message; any Daily Power Report message id in the pack is acceptable.

Scope = curated pack 'symes-k__confirms' only (origin: symes-k/confirms). The folder consists of power trade confirmation correspondence (verifying/processing executed power trades). Grade correct if the answer identifies the work as (power) trade confirmations; accept the canonical value or a listed alias, case-insensitive. This is a summary answer whose determinism rests on naming the document type 'trade confirmations'; free-form wording is accepted only if it clearly names trade confirmations. Evidence_mode=any: the listed id is a representative confirmations message; any in-scope pack message id is acceptable as an anchor.

Scope = curated pack 'kean-s__enrononline' only (origin: kean-s/enrononline). Counted rule: packaged emails whose top-level From is leonardo.pacheco@enron.com (case-insensitive). Count over the whole pack = 24 (verified against evidence_medium.jsonl); he is the pack's primary contributor (24 of 33 messages). Answer must equal the integer 24. Evidence_mode=any: each listed id is a message Leonardo Pacheco sent within the pack; any in-scope message he sent is an acceptable anchor.

Scope = curated pack 'dasovich-j__pg_e_hydro_sale' only (origin: dasovich-j/pg_e_hydro_sale). Counted rule: packaged emails whose top-level From is mona.petrochko@enron.com (case-insensitive). Count over the whole pack = 8 (verified against evidence_medium.jsonl); she is the top sender in this 236-participant topic. Answer must equal the integer 8. Evidence_mode=any: each listed id is a message Mona Petrochko sent within the pack; any in-scope message she sent is an acceptable anchor.
